calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-05-2015 Granted Per Written Order

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (666 Madrid Street)
Off Calendar Mar-03-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lawrence Lanctot for Debra Dolch.

The sale was confirmed at $560,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed January 27, 2015. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond amount is to be determined by Mr. Lanctot.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Murillo. (Not Reported)
